author: ep0ch-nc
name: RPS
description: Challenge another user or a fake CPU opponent to RPS. Picks submitted via DM. Tracks per-user stats.
install_msg: Loaded. Start with `[p]rps challenge @user` or `[p]rps challenge bot` for solo.
end_user_data_statement: Stores per-user RPS win/loss/tie counts keyed by Discord user ID. Cleared via `[p]rpsreset` or Red's data deletion requests.
